title: OPEXIT
summary:
Main
Image reference: assets/2026-05-05_opexit_img_products-tanker_ac4a0785a905.jpg
Last week, the United Arab Emirates (UAE) confirmed its exit from OPEC. Whilst an exit had been mooted before, the timing of the announcement surprised many given the ongoing Middle East war. With Hormuz effectively closed, and oil production shut in across the region, Abu Dhabi's announcement will not impact oil markets today.
